variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SABP 060010 Glass For Cyclone. Easy to install and replace, the SABP 060010 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: GLASS FOR CYCLONE, Dimension 1 (D1): 118.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 48.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 60.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 57.0 mm
